tr.description:
Staying on task seems is a real challenge for our screen-bound generation. The Be Focused lets you get things done by breaking up individual tasks among discrete intervals, separated by short breaks. It’s a surprisingly effective way to retain motivation and focus. Create tasks, configure breaks and track your progress throughout the day, week or custom period. Use Be Focused on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac — everything stays perfectly in sync.

Task Management

•	Create and manage tasks
•	Add notes and due dates to tasks
•	Organize tasks with tags and filters
•	Paste task lists from other apps

Timer Control

•	Start, pause, or skip intervals
•	Auto-start the next interval (optionally)
•	Plan intervals needed for task completion and track accuracy
•	Manage completed intervals

Timer Customization

•	Set durations for work sessions, short and long breaks
•	Define number of intervals before a long break
•	Set a daily goal for completed intervals 
•	Assign different timer settings to individual tasks

Reports

•	View detailed reports to monitor your progress
•	Export your data in CSV format

Sounds and Notifications

•	Chronometer ticking sound with adjustable frequency
•	Variety of alarm sounds
•	Interactive notifications
•	Adjustable volume for alarms and chronometer

Integration

•	Sync across all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac) *
•	Integration with Focus Matrix to manage tasks using urgent/important principle **
•	Integration with Shortcuts app to automate workflow

Quick Access

•	Widgets for Lock Screen and Home Screen
•	Live activities for Lock Screen and Dynamic Island
•	Control to start or stop the timer from the Lock Screen, Controls Center, or Action Button

Automation

•	Integration with Shortcuts app (control tasks and timers via Shortcuts app)
•	Automate Shortcuts execution on events in Be Focused app

Device Support

•	Apple Watch support
•	Also available for Mac
•	Dark and Light mode support

* Sync with Mac requires Be Focused Pro for macOS, sold separately.
** Integration with Focus Matrix requires the Pro version of Focus Matrix, sold separately.

【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
tr.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

This time, you can learn chords and scales visually. Explore the structure of chords by moving different chord tones. You’ll gain a thorough understanding of the origins of chord names. This app can generate every chord structure you can imagine, making it easy to look up and memorize them. The process of understanding music should be clear and simple. GenChord helps you uncover the core principles behind music. 

· Library – Quick Chord Lookup
Generate every possible chord from a music theory perspective—no need to wonder if the list is complete. Tap to play the chord, long press to arpeggiate, swipe right for details.

· Query - Chord Reverse Finder. Reverse lookup for basic chords / omit chords / inverted chords / chords with all added tensions. In the playground, Bluetooth connection and MIDI cable connection are also supported. Now you can enjoy features that were previously available only to PC users.

· Create – Your Own Chords
collect and curate chord progressions. Enjoy more control features, add memory curves, and include numbered notation. Rearrange and combine freely—one chord can evolve into endless variations. Your pop/jazz assistant—you deserve it.

· Playground – Music Sandbox
For teaching, training, and testing—your free space to play music and your Swiss Army knife for creation. Highly recommended: the Diatonic Chords feature to explore beautiful progressions. Tap anytime, anywhere to trigger inspiring notes.

pt.description:
This work requires a constant internet connection. The full content consists of all 16 chapters, including chapters 1-2 (already purchased) and chapters 3-16 which need to be purchased to unlock.

You've never played anything like this before—Road to Empress I, a cinematic palace challenge where your move shapes the palace drama!

Full 4K Live-Action Star-Studded Performance
Watch real drama unfold through the eyes of talented actors performing on lavishly crafted sets. Featuring Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo, Hana Lin, Zi Yu, Qi Xiaxia, and an ensemble cast who bring the imperial court to life in breathtaking 4K detail. Everything has been meticulously recreated to pull you deep into the heart of ancient China's most glorious palace.

Your Choices Shape History
This is where film meets gaming in perfect harmony. Every choice matters. One moment of misplaced trust could send you spiraling into betrayal and death. Who's manipulating you? Who can you manipulate in return?

Survive to Rule
Rising from obscurity to ultimate power out of multiple deadly story branches takes cunning, charm, and wisdom. The crown awaits... if you live long enough to claim it.

Uncover the Palace's Darkest Secrets
Behind the golden facade of the imperial court lies a web of forbidden desires, deadly conspiracies, and buried truths. The Prince's secret affair with the court bard, the Princess's hidden lover, the vengeful spirits haunting the abandoned Cold Palace... Every scandal of the ancient dynasty awaits your discovery.

Multiple Playthroughs
With over 8 hours of cinematic content, no two playthroughs are alike. Your choices don't just change the story; they define who you become. Earn a personalized Trait Sketch based on your decisions, collect beautiful traditional artifacts, unlock hidden storylines, and crown your favorite characters in global popularity contests!

About New One Studio
We are an independent creative team focused on crafting full-motion video experiences that blend Eastern culture with interactive storytelling. Our goal is to create immersive experiences that cross cultural boundaries. In 2019, The Invisible Guardian received BAFTA recognition and connected with millions through its non-linear narrative and deep exploration of moral choices. Now we return with "Road to Empress," weaving the ancient dynasty legends into an interactive experience that bridges cultures and centuries. Step into our world of palace intrigue, where ancient wisdom meets modern storytelling, and every choice echoes through history. Inspired by the ancient dynasty legends, we create Road to Empress I. Chapters 1-16 dive into the empress's legendary beginnings. Watch an unknown girl proceed with caution in palace crawling with enemies, using extraordinary wit and remarkable courage to outlast brutal power struggles, slowly making her name. These are the most nail-biting years—calm before storm, plotting rise while staying under radar. Every move sets stage for her ultimate climb to power pyramid's top. More chapters under development. Stay tuned!

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
X: https://x.com/roadtoempressen

Façam os comboios japoneses funcionar!

Não é necessário nenhum conhecimento ferroviário para jogar "Tokyo Train!".
Este jogo é um jogo de cérebro com regras simples, mas requer muito poder cerebral.

Os clientes esperam na estação que os comboios cheguem para os levar aos seus destinos.
Comece os comboios e transporte os seus clientes.

Ganharão dinheiro por cada passageiro que embarcar num comboio.
Ajuste o intervalo entre as viagens e o número de vagões para alcançar a maior receita.
A partida dos comboios custa dinheiro. Se enviar demasiados comboios e a taxa de embarque baixar, perderá as suas receitas.

O método de operação é muito fácil e as regras são simples.
Só tem de ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem na melhor altura.
À medida que o jogo avança, as tarifas expressas também aparecerão.

Não é necessário qualquer conhecimento técnico.
Tanto as pessoas que gostam de comboios como as pessoas que gostam de jogos podem rapidamente compreender e desfrutar do jogo.

Não há compras em espera. Não há anúncios.
Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo.
Partilhe os seus resultados operacionais nas redes sociais.

pt.description:
Aventure-se roubando no premiado jogo de tabuleiro!
Uma nova aventura começa!
"Clank!, o icônico jogo de aventura de tabuleiro de construção de baralho desafia os ladrões ousados a se infiltrarem no covil do dragão, roubar um de seus preciosos artefatos e escapar antes de virar churrasco!

Juntando mais fãs e prêmios ao redor do mundo, Clank! é um dos mais amados jogos de tabuleiro moderno com muitas expansões e adaptações para a diversão dos jogadores."
O quão fundo você irá se aventurar?
"Quanto mais fundo for, mais valiosos serão os tesouros que encontrar... mas será mais difícil ainda escapar! Então seja breve e não faça barulho: Um passo em falso e CLANK! Cada barulho pode chamar a atenção do dragão.

Você está competindo contra seus amigos ladrões para reivindicar o prêmio mais valioso... mas você só terá o saque se conseguir escapar das profundezas com vida!"
Escolha seu caminho
"Você vai precisar de um bom par de botas, uma espada afiada e todas suas habilidades de ladino para sobreviver na masmorra. Ao longo do caminho, você irá adquirir novos itens, perícias e aliados para te ajudar a conquistar a vitória!

Misturando construção de baralho e exploração, Clank! oferece uma aventura de exploração de masmorra única a cada vez que jogar."
Diversas formas de jogar
"Aprenda a usar as cordas no tutorial guia e aprimore suas habilidades ao coletar conquistas e concluir desafios. Jogue em multiplataforma com os amigos ou compita em novos e empolgantes Assaltos que colocam você contra jogadores de todo o mundo!

Seja como for que você entrar na masmorra: boa sorte... você vai precisar!"

pt.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

pt.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

pt.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

pt.description:
'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases.




【In-App Purchases】

Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD
Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD
Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD
Both modes support free trial before purchase. 
'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year.
Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates.




Song of the Knights:
This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure.




Shining Stars:

Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity.




【Device Support】
iOS 10.0 or later
Devices with 3GB RAM or more
iPhone 7 or newer
iPad Air 3 or newer





【Contact Us】
If you need help during the game or encounter any issues, feel free to contact us via email.
Official Email: knight@longyougame.com

You wake up on the beach of a mysterious tropical island after a shipwreck. 
Survival is your only goal: build shelter, craft tools, find food and fresh water, and uncover the island's hidden secrets!

• Immerse yourself in natural white noise.

pt.description:
Manter-se na tarefa parece ser um verdadeiro desafio para a nossa geração ligada às telas. O "Be Focused" permite realizar tarefas dividindo-as em intervalos discretos, separados por pequenas pausas. É uma maneira surpreendentemente eficaz de manter a motivação e o foco. Crie tarefas, configure pausas e monitore seu progresso ao longo do dia, semana ou período personalizado. Use o Be Focused no seu iPhone, iPad ou Mac — tudo permanece perfeitamente sincronizado.

Gerenciamento de Tarefas

•	Crie e gerencie tarefas
•	Adicione notas e datas de vencimento às tarefas
•	Organize tarefas com etiquetas e filtros
•	Cole listas de tarefas de outros aplicativos

Controle do Cronômetro

•	Inicie, pause ou pule intervalos
•	Início automático do próximo intervalo (opcional)
•	Planeje os intervalos necessários para concluir as tarefas e acompanhe a precisão
•	Gerencie intervalos concluídos

Personalização do Cronômetro

•	Defina durações para sessões de trabalho, pausas curtas e longas
•	Determine o número de intervalos antes de uma pausa longa
•	Defina uma meta diária de intervalos concluídos
•	Atribua diferentes configurações de cronômetro para tarefas individuais

Relatórios

•	Visualize relatórios detalhados para monitorar seu progresso
•	Exporte seus dados em formato CSV

Sons e Notificações

•	Som de tique-taque do cronômetro com frequência ajustável
•	Variedade de sons de alarme
•	Notificações interativas
•	Volume ajustável para alarmes e cronômetro

Integração

•	Sincronize entre todos os seus dispositivos (iPhone, iPad, Mac) *
•	Integração com o Focus Matrix para gerenciar tarefas usando o princípio urgente/importante **
•	Integração com o aplicativo Atalhos para automatizar fluxos de trabalho

Acesso Rápido

•	Widgets para a Tela Bloqueada e Tela de Início
•	Atividades ao Vivo para a Tela Bloqueada e Ilha Dinâmica
•	Controle para iniciar ou parar o cronômetro a partir da Tela Bloqueada, Central de Controle ou Botão de Ação

Automação

•	Integração com o aplicativo Atalhos (controle tarefas e cronômetros via aplicativo Atalhos)
•	Automatize a execução de Atalhos em eventos no aplicativo Be Focused

Compatibilidade de Dispositivos

•	Compatível com Apple Watch
•	Também disponível para Mac
•	Suporte aos modos Escuro e Claro

* A sincronização com o Mac requer o Be Focused Pro para macOS, vendido separadamente.
** A integração com o Focus Matrix requer a versão Pro do Focus Matrix, vendida separadamente.

pt.description:
Você consegue contaminar o mundo? Plague Inc. é uma mistura única de alta estratégia e simulação terrivelmente realista.

pt.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
pt.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

pt.description:
Vocês já está cansado das mesas velhas histórias? Você está interessado em jogos narrativos, romances gráficos, jogos baseados em chat e jogos indie, mas você está cansado da mesma coisa? Se sim, você deveria checar '7Days', um jogo de mistério com romance gráfico e baseado em decisões. 

'7Days' é um jogo narrativo de mistério com romance gráfico. É um jogo narrativo único baseado em decisões onde o usuário pode criar suas histórias baseadas na escolha que ele fizer.

Nós fornecemos a melhor experiência de um jogo narrativo com um enredo de mistério em estilo bate papo, projetado para dispositivos móveis. É um jogo altamente recomendado para você.

■ Jogo explicado
Toda escolha muda a sua história.
Cada pequena escolha irá mudar seu relacionamento com seus companheiros,
e altera seu destino e de seus companheiros nos momentos críticos.

Você pode ser o vilão ou um companheiro de confiança.
Tudo depende de suas escolhas.

■ Resumo
Existem espíritos que foram colocados ao testa para ressurreição no mundo da morte.
O mensageiro da morte os atribuiu com a tarefa de se atacarem ou trabalharem juntos. Seu personagem, Kirell, deve completar tambés as tarefas baseadas em escolhas que lhe foram atribuídas.
Mas suas tarefas necessitam que outros morram...

Você só tem 7 dias
O que você irá escolher?

Experimente está história que provoca a imaginação agora mesmo.

■ Características do jogo
- Estilo quadrinho com gráficos incríveis
- Enredo único que alterna entre a vida e a morte
- O enredo muda de acordo com suas escolhas
- Várias conquistas e desafios ocultos
- Episódios e finais diferentes baseados na história
- Aventura de texto com uma sensação misteriosa
- Enredo excitante

■ Recomendado para aqueles que:
- Estão interessados em conteúdo/texto interativo como romances gráficos, jogos narrativos, jogos de bate papo e jogos sociais
- São apaixonados por jogos indie como 'Undertale'
- Estão procurando por uma jogo narrativo com elementos de mistério e/ou terror
- Estão procurando por O jogo e estão cansados dos jogos narrativos de sempre
- Estão interessados em diferentes tipos de jogos de aventura
Nós também recomendamos 'Underworld Office: Ghost Game', outro de nossos grandes jogos.

■ Nós garantimos a diversão. Baixe e experimente agora

Se você encontrar algum problema ou tem alguma sugestão, por favor, envie para nós em help@buffstudio.com. Nós trabalhamos duro para fazer os melhores jogos de aventura, narrativos, indie, restauradores e romances gráficos.

■ Nós precisamos da sua ajuda para fazer jogos narrativos melhores. Por favor, recomende este jogo narrativo para sua família e amigos. Será de grande ajuda para nós.

pt.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

Desta vez, você pode aprender acordes e escalas visualmente. Explore a estrutura dos acordes movendo diferentes notas de cada acorde. Você obterá uma compreensão completa da origem dos nomes dos acordes. Este aplicativo pode gerar toda a estrutura de acordes que você imaginar, facilitando consultá-los e memorizá-los. O processo de entender música deve ser claro e simples. O GenChord ajuda você a descobrir os princípios essenciais por trás da música. 

· Biblioteca – Consulta rápida de acordes
Gere todos os acordes possíveis a partir da perspectiva da teoria musical — sem precisar se perguntar se a lista está completa. Toque para ouvir o acorde, pressione longamente para arpejar, deslize para a direita para ver detalhes.

· Query – Consulta: Busca reversa de acordes. Busca reversa para acordes básicos / acordes omitidos / acordes invertidos / todos os acordes com tensões adicionadas. No Playground, também são suportadas conexões via Bluetooth e cabo MIDI. Agora você pode aproveitar recursos que antes estavam disponíveis apenas para usuários de PC.

· Criar – Seus próprios acordes
Colete e organize progressões de acordes. Aproveite mais recursos de controle, adicione curvas de memória e inclua notação numérica. Reorganize e combine livremente — um acorde pode evoluir em variações infinitas. Seu assistente de pop/jazz — você merece.

· Playground – Caixa de música
Para ensino, treino e testes — seu espaço livre para tocar música e sua ferramenta multifuncional para criação. Altamente recomendado: o recurso Acordes Diatônicos para explorar progressões bonitas. Toque a qualquer hora e lugar para disparar notas inspiradoras.
